profile.premiumDesc: This setting is available for servers with an active Basic or Pro subscription.
profile.rateLimitWait: Bot profile updates are rate limited right now. Please wait about {minutes} minute(s) and try again.
profile.rateLimitUnknown: Bot profile updates are rate limited right now. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
profile.saveError: Failed to save profile. Please try again.
profile.readError: Failed to read the selected image.

autoPurge.title: Auto Purge
autoPurge.desc: Automatically deletes messages in specified channels on a schedule

autoReact.title: Auto React
autoReact.desc: Automatically reacts to all posts in a channel

rolekeeper.title: Role Keeper
rolekeeper.desc: Configure automatic role restoration when members leave and rejoin

enable.label: Enable Role Keeper
enable.desc: When enabled, members who rejoin will have their previous roles automatically restored

excludeAdmin.label: Exclude Admin Roles
excludeAdmin.desc: Admin roles will be excluded from restoration

excludeMod.label: Exclude Moderator Roles
excludeMod.desc: Moderator roles will be excluded from restoration

aimod.title: AI Moderation
aimod.desc: Configure automatic chat monitoring and response by AI
aimod.logChannelDesc: Specify the channel to send AI moderation logs and review notices
aimod.legacyAiDesc: Automatically reports and deletes messages based on omni-moderation scores
aimod.legacyAiReportScoreDesc: Lower is more sensitive; flagged messages are reported to the log
aimod.legacyAiDeleteScoreDesc: Messages above this value are auto-deleted (recommended ≥ report value)
aimod.legacyAiScoreRecommend: Delete score should be greater than or equal to report score
aimod.legacyAiBypassChannelsDesc: Messages in these channels skip AI moderation
aimod.legacyAiBypassRolesDesc: Users with these roles skip AI moderation
aimod.legacyAiBypassStringsDesc: Messages containing these strings are skipped
aimod.permissionDenied: You don't have Master permission to change settings
aimod.forbiddenDesc: You need Master permission to view or edit moderation settings for this server.
aimod.modeDesc: Choose how messages are automatically monitored
aimod.modeLegacyDesc: Automatically detects, reports and removes inappropriate messages (free)
aimod.modeAdvancedDesc: Advanced AI moderation that understands context
aimod.advancedLaneSectionDesc: Configure detailed settings for next-gen AI moderation (advanced mode)
aimod.naturalLanguageRulesDesc: Describe server-specific moderation rules in plain language. The AI will understand and apply them during evaluation
aimod.naturalLanguageRulesSurcharge: Rules add +{cc} CC per judgment based on length (+1 CC per 500 characters)
aimod.naturalLanguageRulesNoSurcharge: No additional CC — no rules set
aimod.naturalLanguageRulesPlaceholder:
e.g.
- No political or religious debates
- No content inappropriate for users under 18
- Remove insulting remarks directed at other users
aimod.advancedViolationStorageDesc: AI classifies and stores violation reasons in detail. Useful for richer moderation logs, but consumes 2 CC per violation
aimod.modLogCompactDesc: Show moderator logs as a concise one-line entry. When off (default), logs are shown in detail with thumbnails and confidence gauges
aimod.nodeEditorLinkDesc: Visually build and edit the moderation pipeline with nodes
aimod.nodeEditorLockedTooltip: The node editor is available on a higher plan (NODE_EDITOR)
aimod.nodeEditorSectionDesc: Build your AI moderation flow with the visual pipeline builder
aimod.modeAdvancedFeature: Gemini context · CC cost · Auto punishment
aimod.presetDesc: Pick how strict detection should be. Choose Custom to fine-tune each value
aimod.preset_lenient_trait: False positives: minimal / Cost: low / Misses: more
aimod.preset_balanced_desc: A balanced default trading off confidence and cost
aimod.preset_balanced_trait: False positives: medium / Cost: medium / Misses: medium
aimod.preset_strict_desc: Analyzes gray cases broadly to minimize misses
aimod.preset_strict_trait: False positives: higher / Cost: high / Misses: minimal
aimod.cfgConfidenceDesc: Only verdicts at or above this confidence are auto-punished. Higher is more cautious
aimod.cfgGrayDesc: How aggressively ambiguous (gray) messages are sent to detailed AI analysis. Higher uses detailed analysis more (more cost)
aimod.cfgMinLenDesc: Messages shorter than this character count are excluded from AI analysis
aimod.cfgTrustedDesc: What share of trusted users (no violation history) to spot-check. 0% skips them entirely
aimod.cfgScreenDesc: Sensitivity of the mechanical first-pass before AI analysis. Higher sends more messages to deeper analysis
aimod.cfgDetailLlmDesc: Enable high-accuracy detailed AI analysis including prior history (increases CC cost)
aimod.enforcementModeDesc: Choose how far AI verdicts are enforced automatically
aimod.enforcement_auto_lowrisk_desc: Auto-punish only clear low-risk cases; everything else goes to review
aimod.enforcement_auto_full_desc: Enforce automatically per policy verdict (trusted users always go to review)
aimod.aiActiveDesc: Runs AI verdicts for the advanced lane. When OFF, the bot will not run any verdicts even if advanced mode is selected
aimod.aiActiveOffWarning: Currently OFF, so the bot will not run any verdicts even if advanced mode is selected
aimod.imageModerationDesc: When OFF, only text is analyzed and images are not sent to the AI (saves CC)

detections.title: Recent Detections
detections.desc: Latest messages flagged by AI moderation

aimodEditor.title: Node Editor
aimodEditor.stringListPlaceholder: Type and press Enter to add

validation.errorMultipleEntry: Only one input node is allowed
validation.errorCycle: Cannot save: the pipeline contains a cycle (it would cause an infinite loop)

fields.channel_hint: Channels to target. Leave empty to target all channels
fields.category_hint: Categories to target. All channels under them are included
fields.user_hint: User IDs to target. Leave empty to target all users
fields.role_hint: Roles to target. Users with these roles are included
fields.joinAge_hint: Filter by time since joining the server (e.g. 7d, 24h)
fields.report_type_hint: How detailed the log report is. Normal = standard / Minimum = minimal / Debug = verbose
fields.velocity_limit_hint: More joins/posts than this in a short window is treated as a raid
fields.detect_bots_hint: Also detect mass joins/posts from bots
fields.block_invites_hint: Block messages containing Discord invite links
fields.block_scams_hint: Block messages matching known scam or phishing patterns
fields.custom_patterns_hint: Add your own regex patterns to block
fields.max_mentions_hint: A message with more mentions than this is flagged as a violation
fields.sensitivity_hint: Screening sensitivity. Higher sends more messages downstream as suspects
fields.threshold_hint: If the latest verdict's confidence is at or above this, branch to true
fields.message_hint: The message to act on. Use 'current' for the current message
fields.duration_hint: Punishment duration (e.g. 1h, 1d). Leave empty for permanent
fields.delete_message_hint: How far back to delete messages on ban (e.g. 1d). Empty deletes nothing
fields.content_hint: The body of the message to send
fields.deniedActions_hint: Actions listed here are excluded right before execution, even if the AI or policy decides to take them. Leave empty to keep the default behavior. Valid keys: QUARANTINE, TIMEOUT_24H, TIMEOUT_1H, TIMEOUT_30M, TIMEOUT_10M, TIMEOUT_5M, DELETE_MESSAGE, WARN, SEND_TO_REVIEW_QUEUE, ADD_SUSPICION_LEVEL_1, NOTIFY_OWNER, MARK_COHORT_SUSPICION_LV2, UNQUARANTINE

MessageReceived.label: Message Received
MessageReceived.desc: The pipeline entry point. Each posted message flows from here to the next node

Rule.label: Rule
Rule.desc: Evaluates against your natural-language rules and passes the result to the next node

Condition.label: Condition
Condition.desc: Branches into match / no-match based on channel/category/user/role/join age

TimeWindowCondition.label: Time Window
TimeWindowCondition.desc: Branches into match / no-match based on whether now falls in the given time window

ParallelStart.label: Parallel Start
ParallelStart.desc: Runs several branches at once from here; they rejoin at Parallel End

ParallelEnd.label: Parallel End
ParallelEnd.desc: Waits for all branches from Parallel Start, then merges into one and continues

SummaryReport.label: Summary Report
SummaryReport.desc: Sends the verdict so far to the log channel as a report (1CC)

HistorySummarizer.label: History Summarizer
HistorySummarizer.desc: Summarizes recent conversation history so downstream AI nodes have context

ReviewQueue.label: Review Queue
ReviewQueue.desc: Adds to a human moderator review queue instead of auto-punishing

AntiRaid.label: Anti-Raid
AntiRaid.desc: Detects mass joins/posts in a short window and branches match / no-match (0CC)

RegexBlock.label: Regex Block
RegexBlock.desc: Checks invites, scams and custom regex patterns and branches match / no-match (0CC)

TextFilter.label: Text Filter
TextFilter.desc: Branches match / no-match on mechanical rules such as mention count (0CC)

ThreatDb.label: Threat DB
ThreatDb.desc: Matches against a known threat database and branches match / no-match (0CC)

Screen.label: Screen
Screen.desc: Lightweight AI first pass; branches match / no-match so only suspects go to downstream LLMs (0CC)

LiteLlm.label: Lite LLM
LiteLlm.desc: A lightweight AI (Gemini) reads the content and routes it to safe/gray/violation (2CC)

DetailLlm.label: Detail LLM
DetailLlm.desc: A high-accuracy AI (Gemini) judges in detail including prior history, branching match / no-match (5CC)

Confidence.label: Confidence
Confidence.desc: Compares the latest verdict's confidence to a threshold and branches match / no-match (2CC)

AdvancedLlm.label: Advanced LLM
AdvancedLlm.desc: A high-accuracy AI (Gemini) produces a verdict and passes it straight to the next node (5CC)

ActionPolicy.label: Action Policy
ActionPolicy.desc: Decides which punishment to take based on the verdict so far and passes it on

ExecuteAction.label: Execute Action
ExecuteAction.desc: Executes the punishments decided by Action Policy together

Timeout.label: Timeout
Timeout.desc: Times out (mutes) the target user for the given period

Kick.label: Kick
Kick.desc: Kicks the target user from the server

Ban.label: Ban
Ban.desc: Bans the target user. You can also set how far back to delete their messages

Warn.label: Warn
Warn.desc: Records and notifies a warning to the target user

MessageSend.label: Message Send
MessageSend.desc: Sends a message with the given content to the channel

aimodEditor.emptyDesc: Drag nodes from the palette or start from a template

test.title: Test run
test.subtitle: Run a sample message through the current pipeline (unsaved changes included) and trace each node
test.inputPlaceholder: Type a message to test, e.g. "Join now https://discord.gg/..."

footer.partialShortfall: Some checks were skipped due to insufficient credits

errors.botMissing: The bot isn't in this server yet. Invite the bot before running a test.
errors.noConfig: AI moderation isn't set up yet. Add at least one node and try again.
errors.generic: Something went wrong while running the test. Please try again.
errors.unavailable: The bot is temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a moment.

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.desc: Automate Discord events with node-based flows
workflow.emptyDesc: Create a workflow by clicking New
workflow.deleteConfirmDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this workflow? This action cannot be undone.

config.title: Trigger Settings
config.subTitle: Configure settings specific to this trigger.
config.desc: Changing these settings affects when the workflow triggers.
config.memberJoinDesc: This trigger detects when a member joins the server. Add an action node to configure behavior.
config.memberLeaveDesc: This trigger detects when a member leaves the server. Add an action node to configure behavior.
config.intervalHint: Select how often the workflow should run automatically
config.startTimeHint: Specify the exact time to run for daily or weekly schedules
config.targetMessageHint: Detects reactions only on a specific message. If empty, all messages are monitored.
config.createMessagePrompt: Please create a message from the Messages page first.
config.targetRoleHint: Detects operations only on a specific role. If empty, any role triggers it.
config.targetChannelHint: Detects messages only in a specific channel. If empty, all channels are monitored.
config.noSettingsDesc: This trigger does not require any additional configuration.
config.rssFeedUrlHint: Specify the RSS/Atom feed URL to monitor (http/https)
config.rssIntervalHint: Choose how often to check for new posts
config.youtubeChannelIdHint: Specify the YouTube channel ID to receive notifications from
config.twitchBroadcasterUserIdHint: Specify the broadcaster's numeric user ID
config.twitchSubscriptionTypesHint: Select which Twitch events should trigger the workflow
config.customIdFilterHint: Only trigger for custom IDs starting with this value. Empty means all.
config.parentChannelHint: Only trigger for threads in a specific parent channel.
config.voiceChannelHint: Only trigger for a specific voice channel.
config.webhookUrlHint: Send a POST request to this URL to trigger the workflow.
config.webhookNoToken: Webhook token not yet generated. It will appear after saving.
config.webhookRegenerateConfirm: Regenerating the Webhook URL will invalidate the current URL. Continue?
config.webhookUrlDesc: Send a POST request to this URL to trigger the workflow. JSON body fields are available as '{{webhook.payload.key}}'.

twitch_eventsub.label: Twitch Event
twitch_eventsub.desc: When a selected Twitch event is received

editor.validationSendMessageNoChannel: "Send Message" nodes require a target channel.
editor.validationSendMessageEmpty: "Send Message" nodes require either message content or at least one Embed.
editor.validationLoopDetected: Your workflow contains a loop (circular reference). Please remove it to prevent infinite loops.
editor.validationSendDmEmpty: "Send DM" nodes require message content or an Embed.
editor.validationTimeoutEmpty: "Add Timeout" nodes require a duration of at least 1 second.
editor.validationVariableKeyEmpty: "Set Variable" nodes require a variable name.
editor.validationModalCustomIdEmpty: "Open Modal" nodes require a custom ID.
editor.validationModalFieldsEmpty: "Open Modal" nodes require at least one field.
editor.validationThreadNameEmpty: "Create Thread" nodes require a thread name.
editor.validationThreadChannelEmpty: "Create Thread" nodes require a target channel.
editor.validationRenameChannelEmpty: "Rename Channel" nodes require a channel and a new name.
editor.validationAccountAgeEmpty: "Account Age" nodes require a minimum number of days.
editor.validationVarKeyEmpty: "Variable Value" nodes require a variable name.
editor.validationScheduledCronMissing: Scheduled triggers require a cron expression (the cron field).
editor.validationScheduledCronInvalid: Invalid cron expression. Use standard 5-field format (e.g. */5 * * * *).
editor.validationRssFeedUrlMissing: RSS triggers require a feed URL.
editor.validationRssFeedUrlInvalid: RSS feed URL must be a valid http:// or https:// URL.
editor.validationYoutubeChannelIdMissing: YouTube triggers require a channel ID.
editor.validationTwitchBroadcasterUserIdMissing: Twitch triggers require a broadcaster user ID.
editor.validationTwitchBroadcasterUserIdInvalid: Broadcaster user ID must contain numbers only.
editor.validationTwitchSubscriptionTypesMissing: Select at least one Twitch subscription type.
editor.validationTwitchSubscriptionTypeInvalid: Twitch subscription types include an invalid value.

logs.emptyDesc: Logs will appear here once the workflow runs

nodeConfig.createMessagePrompt: Please create a message from the Messages page first.
nodeConfig.buttonModeContinueHint: Clicking this button continues the same workflow. Use '{{button.label}}' and '{{button.index}}' to identify which button was pressed.
nodeConfig.buttonLinkedWorkflowHint: Workflow to run when this button is clicked
nodeConfig.channelNot: Pass when channel does NOT match
nodeConfig.minDaysHint: Filter by account age using the selected comparison operator
nodeConfig.varNote: Variables set via Set Variable nodes can be referenced as '{{variableName}}'
nodeConfig.webhookPayloadHint: Each key in the received JSON is available as '{{webhook.payload.keyName}}'
nodeConfig.threadStarterMessageHint: Message sent immediately after thread creation
nodeConfig.dmBeforeKickHint: Sends a DM to the user before kicking (skipped if DMs are disabled)
nodeConfig.dmBeforeKickPlaceholder: e.g. You have been kicked for rule violation
nodeConfig.dmBeforeBanHint: Sends a DM to the user before banning (skipped if DMs are disabled)
nodeConfig.dmBeforeBanPlaceholder: e.g. You have been banned for spam
nodeConfig.banDeleteDaysHint: Number of days of messages to delete on ban (0–7 days)
nodeConfig.planLockedTrigger: This trigger is only available on {plan} or higher
nodeConfig.dmShowAttributionHint: Adds a disabled button to the DM showing which server sent it
nodeConfig.deleteThreadChannelHint: Leave blank to delete the thread that triggered this workflow

automod.title: Unified Moderation
automod.desc: Configure AutoMod, AntiRaid, and JoinGate settings
automod.whitelistDesc: Configure users, roles, and channels to be exempt from each rule
automod.automodDesc: Automatically detects and responds to spam and suspicious messages
automod.heatPresetDesc: Adjust sensitivity to violations and the strength of sanctions
automod.strictDesc: Responds quickly to even minor violations
automod.logChannelDesc: Channel to receive moderation action notifications
automod.panicModeDesc: When enabled, significantly lowers the action threshold for all users
automod.crossServerOptInDesc: When enabled, anonymously contributes violation data to the cross-server risk database to improve threat detection across servers
automod.trustedRolesDesc: Members with these roles will bypass all AutoMod detection
automod.antiNukeDesc: Detects and responds to destructive server actions (channel deletion, mass bans, etc.)
automod.antiRaidDesc: Detects and responds to raid attacks (mass joins)
automod.antiRaidJoinRateDesc: Triggers raid detection when this many users join within the time window
automod.antiRaidAccountAgeDesc: Accounts newer than this many days add to the raid score
automod.joinGateDesc: Quarantines and requires verification from suspicious new joiners
automod.joinGateFilterNoAvatarDesc: Quarantine accounts with no profile picture
automod.joinGateFilterNewAccountDesc: Quarantine accounts newer than this many days. 0 to disable
automod.joinGateFilterAdvertisingDesc: Quarantine accounts with invite links or banned URLs in their profile
automod.joinGateFilterUnverifiedBotDesc: Quarantine bot accounts that are not verified by Discord
automod.joinGateFilterUnauthorizedBotDesc: Quarantine bots added by members without Master permissions
automod.powGateDesc: Require Cloudflare Turnstile human verification to prevent bots and raiders
automod.powGateAllUsersDesc: When off, only targets users who triggered JoinGate filters
automod.powGateRoleDesc: Role assigned before verification (automatically removed after success)
automod.powGateChannelDesc: Fallback channel when DM fails (permissions auto-adjusted on save)
automod.powGateTimeoutDesc: Minutes before auto-kicking unverified users (0 to disable)
automod.quarantineSetupBannerDesc: Moderation features are enabled but the quarantine role is not set up. Click the button to have the bot auto-create the role and configure channel permissions.
automod.quarantineSetupDone: Setup requested. Changes will apply in a few seconds.
automod.ruleEmojiSpamDesc: +1% per emoji, capped at +20% per message
automod.ruleCharSpamDesc: Detect repeated characters or Zalgo text
automod.ruleUrlScanDesc: Expand short URLs → check with Safe Browsing API
automod.ruleImageHashDesc: Compares images against Cube's spam/NSFW database and auto-removes matches
automod.ruleCrossChannelDesc: Detect similar posts across multiple channels in short time
automod.rulePhishingDesc: Detect known phishing domains and scam URL patterns
automod.ruleBlacklistWordDesc: Add heat to messages containing admin-configured words
automod.blacklistWordWildcardHint: * matches any sequence of characters. e.g. *word* for substring, word* for prefix
automod.blacklistWordRegexHint: JavaScript regex supported (up to 10 regex patterns are synced to Discord AutoMod)
automod.ruleInactiveChannelDesc: Add +3% heat for posting in channels with no recent activity
automod.nightTimeRangeDesc: Severity threshold is lowered during this window (night-time policy)
automod.ruleMessageRepeatDesc: Content similar to the previous message (+8% always)
automod.ruleAttachmentDesc: Image and file attachments (+4% each, always)
automod.mastersDesc: Users who can modify moderation settings (independent of Discord admin permissions)
automod.trustedDesc: Users exempt from Heat, AI, AntiNuke and other enforcement actions
automod.permissionDenied: You don't have Master permission to change settings
automod.scheduleSectionDesc: Automatically change server security settings during specific times or periods.
automod.scheduleRuleTypeInviteDisableDesc: Pauses server invite links during the selected time window.
automod.scheduleRuleTypeDmDisableDesc: Pauses member-to-member DMs through the server during the selected time window.
automod.scheduleRuleTypeSecurityLevelDesc: Raises the verification level only during the window, then restores the original level automatically.
automod.scheduleTimeRangeHint: Applied repeatedly every day during this window (JST). Overnight ranges (e.g. 22:00→08:00) are supported.
automod.scheduleDateRangeHint: Applied once between the start and end date/time.
automod.scheduleActionSecurityLevel: the verification level is raised to "{level}".
automod.scheduleDailyHint: Applied automatically during this window every day (JST). Overnight ranges (e.g. 22:00 → 08:00 next day) are supported.
automod.scheduleEnableLogDesc: Send a log when this starts and ends.
automod.scheduleLevelMediumDesc: Only accounts registered on Discord for more than 5 minutes
automod.scheduleLevelHighDesc: Only accounts in this server for more than 10 minutes

accountSecurity.title: Security
accountSecurity.desc: Register passkeys to log in even if you lose access to Discord
